'''Makksre''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Uoti sector/Legends|Uoti sector]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[Sansia Bardrin]] and [[Jade's Fire|her ship]] were captured by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] some time prior to [[18 ABY/Legends|18 ABY]].

{{Planet-stub}}
